_comment: M4 building/floor metadata (hand-authored). Footprint GEOMETRY is NOT stored here — it is joined at load time from basemap.json by matching feature.id === building.id (the OSM way), so regenerating the basemap never desyncs this file. Floor order is the pill order in the selector. anchor='osm' floors fit directly to the OSM footprint bbox; anchor='control-points' floors (the underground/2nd levels) are deferred (bead aau.6) and carry an empty controlPoints array for now.
